situation: Applied for Blue Card at LEA Berlin while awaiting degree recognition. University degree from India was not listed under anabin H+ category and required individual assessment by the Zentralstelle für ausländisches Bildungswesen (ZAB).
rejection_reason: Degree not automatically recognized under anabin database H+ status. LEA required an official equivalency statement from ZAB before processing the Blue Card application.
what_worked: Employer's legal team obtained a temporary work permit (§19c AufenthG) while ZAB assessment was ongoing. ZAB process took 10 weeks. Once equivalency was confirmed, Blue Card was issued within 2 weeks.
what_failed: Submitting a self-certified translation of the degree. Providing LinkedIn recommendations from German professors. Attempting to use a professional qualification certificate as a substitute for the degree.
